name: okf-toolbox
description: Bootstrap OKF route packs, route agents through route cards at turn start, and maintain route cards after code changes.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap, route, and maintain OKF route packs.
interface.longDescription: Bootstrap OKF route-pack infrastructure in any repository, route agents through route cards before broad source inspection, and maintain route cards after substantive code changes.
defaultPrompt: Route this repository task through OKF route cards.
Check this change for OKF route-pack impact.
